sql.i: select rowguid,flowname,userguid,description,status,addtime,startrole,startname,flowtype,typename,groupname from abs_flowinfo where $like(flowname,flowname) and $equal(status,status)
select count(1) from abs_flowinfo where $like(flowname,flowname) and $equal(status,status)
select rowguid,flowname,flowtype,typename,groupname,grouptype,userguid,description,status,startrole,startname,addtime from abs_flowinfo where rowguid={rowguid}
select rowguid,flowname,flowtype,typename,groupname,grouptype,userguid,description,status,startrole,startname,addtime from abs_flowinfo where rowguid={rowguid}
select rowguid,id,type,position,data,measured,selected,dragging,flowguid from abs_flow_node where flowguid={flowguid}
select rowguid,id,type,position,data,measured,selected,dragging,flowguid from abs_flow_node where flowguid={flowguid} and id={id}
select rowguid,source,sourcehandle,target,id,flowguid from abs_flow_edge where flowguid={flowguid}
delete from abs_flow_node where flowguid={flowguid}
delete from abs_flow_edge where flowguid={flowguid}
select rowguid,flowguid,nodeid,label,roleguid,page,action,remark,addtime from abs_flow_nconfig where flowguid={flowguid} and nodeid={nodeid}
update abs_flowinfo set status={status} where rowguid={rowguid}
select count(1) from abs_flow_nconfig where flowguid={flowguid} and nodeid={nodeid}
select rowguid,id,type,position,data,measured,selected,dragging,flowguid from abs_flow_node where flowguid={flowguid} and type='input'
select target from abs_flow_edge where flowguid={flowguid} and source={source}
select rowguid,id,type,position,data,measured,selected,dragging,flowguid from abs_flow_node where flowguid={flowguid} and id={id}
select nodename,isend,ordernum,flowguid,eventguid from abs_flow_process where $equal(flowguid,flowguid) and eventguid={eventguid} order by ordernum
select rowguid,startname,startuser,grouptype,groupname,flowname,flowguid,pronodeid,pronodename,status,startdate,enddate,flowtype from abs_flow_event where rowguid={rowguid}
select status,ordernum from abs_flow_event where rowguid={rowguid}
select ordernum from abs_flow_process where eventguid={eventguid} and flowguid={flowguid} and nodeid={nodeid}

select rowguid,startname,startuser,grouptype,groupname,flowname,flowguid,pronodeid,pronodename,ordernum,status,startdate,enddate,flowtype from abs_flow_event where startuser={startuser} order by startdate desc
select count(1) from abs_flow_event where startuser={startuser}
